tax: Domain-rank branch for life and life-like systems derived from Inner-Primordial dissolution. Elementals, Unlife, Fey, and Proto-Material are subordinate here because their origins lie in elemental matter, animating force, dreamlike living nature, or material biological descent rather than the outer planes or Far Realm.
ap: The domain has no common silhouette. Elementals may be bodies of fire, stone, air, or water; unlife may be animated negative persistence; fey express glamour-bound living nature; material organisms retain ordinary tissues, bones, spores, cells, or shells. Anatomy must be read at kingdom or lower rank.
eco: Inner Primordials occupies the niche implied by its own origin, anatomy, and recorded habitat. For field use, note diet or energy source, reproduction or formation, shelter, lifecycle, and what evidence remains after it passes.
beh: Inner Primordials behaviour should be read from its own body and origin: how it moves, feeds, responds to threat, treats kin or rivals, and repeats habits in the field.
traitsText: Inner Primordials traits include the size, senses, resistances, movement, intelligence, vulnerabilities, and diagnostic field marks belonging to this entry alone. Recorded flags: fossil or inferred, theorized.
abilities: Inner Primordials abilities are the natural, supernatural, magical, psionic, or extraordinary capacities actually supported by its own description. Text indicates: fire, stone.
bg: This domain anchors most life encountered in the Throat: its stone, water, fungus, beast, humanoid, dragon, elemental, fey, and unlife phenomena all depend on Inner-Primordial inheritance rather than Outer-Planar alignment or Far-Realm intrusion.
g: Inner Primordial Life is the domain of elemental, fey, unlife, and material-plane derivation: the world-facing inheritance of the Inner Primordials. It includes ordinary material organisms through Proto-Material, but also the elemental and animating substrates that predate flesh and can produce non-biological life forms.
note: Promoted from Kingdom to Domain. Elementals, Unlife, Fey, and Proto-Material are intentionally retained beneath it.
